agents.name: architect
agents.specialization: Senior Software Architect — specializes in high-level system design, deep reasoning, and technical trade-off analysis

agents.name: comparator
agents.specialization: System Migration Analyst — compares business logic between legacy and new systems

agents.name: designer
agents.specialization: UI/UX Designer — produces visual specs pre-implementation and validates UI quality post-implementation

agents.name: developer
agents.specialization: Senior Software Engineer — implements solutions, debugs issues, writes code

agents.name: devops
agents.specialization: Senior DevOps Engineer — specialist in CI/CD, infrastructure, and deployment automation

agents.name: documenter
agents.specialization: Technical Writer — generates and updates project documentation from code and implementation context

agents.name: maintenance
agents.specialization: Senior Maintenance Engineer — specialist in code health, technical debt, and system evolution

agents.name: mcp-manager
agents.specialization: MCP Administrator — manages MCP server configurations, connections, and development

agents.name: planner
agents.specialization: Senior Technical Architect — analyzes requests, breaks down tasks, creates execution plans

agents.name: researcher
agents.specialization: Research Engineer — gathers, synthesizes, and reports technical information before planning or implementation

agents.name: reviewer
agents.specialization: Senior Code Reviewer & Security Analyst — reviews code quality, security, performance

agents.name: security
agents.specialization: Senior Security Engineer — specialist in vulnerability analysis, compliance, and threat modeling

agents.name: support
agents.specialization: Senior Support Engineer — specialist in runtime troubleshooting, log analysis, and incident response

agents.name: tester
agents.specialization: Senior QA Engineer — validates implementations, writes tests, reports coverage

skills.name: analyze
skills.description: Analyze code or system structure and report findings on complexity, dependencies, and risks.

skills.name: ask
skills.description: Expert assistant for answering technical and general questions with grounded context.

skills.name: audit
skills.description: Audit dependencies and static code for security vulnerabilities and license compliance

skills.name: brainstorm
skills.description: Software solution brainstorming, architectural evaluation, and technical decision debating.

skills.name: bridge-task-runner
skills.command: Bridge orchestrator (`orchestrator.py`) — not directly by users
skills.description: Execute a bridge pipeline task and signal completion by updating the task JSON status.

skills.name: bug-fixer
skills.description: Identify root cause from error logs and generate a verified code fix with regression tests.

skills.name: compare-logic
skills.description: Compares business logic between a legacy system and a new, migrated system by analyzing their source code.

skills.name: debug
skills.description: Identify root cause of a software error and recommend a precise fix.

skills.name: deploy
skills.description: Execute build and deployment pipelines to various environments

skills.name: document
skills.description: Generate accurate technical documentation from provided code content and context.

skills.name: export-session
skills.description: Exports the current session state and conversation summary for continuation.

skills.name: git
skills.description: Execute git operations: commit, branch, status, PR prep, and conflict detection.

skills.name: health-check
skills.description: Validate framework compliance across all agents and skills.

skills.name: infra
skills.description: Manage infrastructure as code (Docker, K8s, Terraform configurations)

skills.name: intake
skills.description: Capture, structure, and refine initial user requirements or project ideas.

skills.name: mcp-manager
skills.description: Manage MCP server configuration, test connections, and scaffold new servers. Use this skill to add/edit/remove MCP servers or to troubleshoot connectivity.

skills.name: migrate
skills.description: Manage database schema changes and data migrations

skills.name: monitor
skills.description: Analyze system logs and monitor performance metrics to detect anomalies

skills.name: onboard
skills.description: Helps users quickly grasp a new project securely. Summarizes architecture, tech stack, dependencies, and development workflow while ensuring sensitive data remains confidential.

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Break down a complex task into structured, executable subtasks with dependencies and effort estimates.

skills.name: refactor
skills.description: Improve code structure and maintainability without changing external behavior

skills.name: research
skills.description: Gather, compare, and synthesize technical options into a structured recommendation report.

skills.name: review
skills.description: Comprehensive review of code quality, API design, security, and performance with actionable findings.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.flags: - `--skill`: Generate a new skill component at `.gemini/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`
skills.description: Generate agent and skill files following Gemini Kit templates and rules.

skills.name: sql
skills.description: Optimize a SQL query for performance while preserving its logical result.

skills.name: summarize
skills.description: Compress conversation history or agent output into a structured, token-efficient summary.

skills.name: ui
skills.description: Generate precise visual component specs or review implemented UI for design quality and accessibility compliance.
